root.sql:
SELECT (select coop_name from sc_cnt_m_coop ) as coop_name, (select prename from sc_mem_m_ucf_prename where prename_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code)||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name||' '||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname as member_name, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.total_loan_int, sc_lon_m_loan_card.year_total_interest, sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , 'DAYที่ SD MONTH YYYY') as begining_of_contract_thai, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no, floor(sc_lon_m_contract.loan_installment_amount/12) as loan_installment_amount, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_objective_code, sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_objective_description, PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_line(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no,('0')::text) as address_pres, sc_lon_m_contract.remark, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( '!loan_payment_date_1!' , 'YYYY') as year_date,
sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount, pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai ((sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount)::double precision) as thai_loan_approve_amount , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card, substr(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card,1,1) as c_id_card_1, substr(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card,2,1) as c_id_card_2, substr(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card,3,1) as c_id_card_3, substr(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card,4,1) as c_id_card_4, substr(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card,5,1) as c_id_card_5, substr(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card,6,1) as c_id_card_6, substr(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card,7,1) as c_id_card_7, substr(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card,8,1) as c_id_card_8, substr(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card,9,1) as c_id_card_9, substr(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card,10,1) as c_id_card_10, substr(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card,11,1) as c_id_card_11, substr(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card,12,1) as c_id_card_12, substr(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card,13,1) as c_id_card_13,
sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type
,( select sum(sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.interest_amout) from sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail where sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.item_type_code not in ('BF','RM','RC') and ( sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_payment_date between '!loan_payment_date_1!' and '!loan_payment_date_1!') ) as total_int
FROM sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_lon_m_contract, sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj, sc_lon_m_loan_card WHERE ( sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_objective_code = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_objective_code ) and ( sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_type = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type in( 'พ1','พ3','พง','ส8','พพ','พ2','พบ','พค') ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_objective_code in ( '01', '02', '03', '04' , '05' , '07' , '08' , '09' , '10' , '11') )
and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no in ( select distinct card.loan_contract_no from sc_lon_m_loan_card card , sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail c_det
where card.loan_contract_no = c_det.loan_contract_no and card.loan_type in ( 'พ1','พ3','พง','ส8','พพ','พ2','พบ','พค') and ( c_det.loan_payment_date between '!loan_payment_date_1!' and '!loan_payment_date_2!' ) and ( c_det.interest_amout > 0 ) and ( c_det.item_type_code not in ( 'BF' )) ) /*WHERE*/ --and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = '13130' ) --and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_objective_code = '03'

r_mwa_loan_int_spec_form_loan_nest_coll.sql: select sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no from sc_lon_m_contract_coll where sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0' and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no = {0} and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code = '04'
